title: Noetra’s CEO calls his robot AI startup a ‘last chance’ for Japan
summary: According to a joint announcement from its partners, the company aims to ship a reasoning model with Japanese-language understanding by fiscal 2027, an omni-modal system that handles text, images, video, and audio by fiscal 2028, and what it calls “Real-world Native AI”…
